evidence: "I have to put this in my top 3 Superhero films ever made."
"This was a very well done and enlightening historical account..."
"This is a complex story that is extremely well executed."
"The story was executed... with great potential."
"The only problem that I had with the movie is that it seemed to rush to a premature ending."
"Every time I watch it I never notice the length."
"The creators took care to keep this movie educational and entertaining."
"The film received widespread critical acclaim at the time of its' release."
"I love Zack Snyder's work... I liked 300. I loved Watchmen and Man of Steel."
"It looks great. It looks really, really great."
"The music score was fantastic... masterful in the way it drove the tone of the scenes in the film."
"I was thoroughly emotionally invested in the outcome and the ending surpassed my expectations."
"This film is a gift to the public... I am moved is an incredible understatement."

summary: The user has a strong preference for superhero films and documentaries, appreciating complex narratives and high production quality. They exhibit brand loyalty to creators like Zack Snyder and Marvel, and their reviews reflect a deep emotional engagement with the content they consume.
